source: #### Implement Feature Flags
esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"
#### Import python libraries

#Get Parameters from controldb
import json
import sys
import logging
#### Configure logging

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    # Configure logging
    def setup_logger(notebook_name):
        # Get or create logger
        logger = logging.getLogger(notebook_name)
        logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)  # Set to DEBUG for detailed logs

        # Remove any existing handlers to prevent duplicates
        logger.handlers.clear()

        # Prevent propagation to root logger (avoids default handlers)
        logger.propagate = False

        # Create console handler
        console_handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
        console_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)

        # Define log format (only the formatted line will appear)
        log_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
        console_handler.setFormatter(log_format)

        # Add handler to logger
        logger.addHandler(console_handler)
        
        return logger

else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

# Get parameters from CTL db
### db_notebookname & NotebookPath: **esg_sharepoint_bronze**

#Get Parameters from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "esg_sharepoint_bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

#Get load meta from controldb

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

#Join cfg_notebook and cfg_notebook_parameter tables to retrieve source & target meta from controldb

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname) 

#display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container 

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']
# Table: **reference_data**: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="reference_data"

#UTILS: Drop db

#spark.sql(f"""DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname} CASCADE""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#Set table name
db_tablename="reference_data"

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    # Set up logger for this notebook section
    logger = setup_logger(db_tablename)	
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

#Create reference_data: Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Dataset STRING,
    Code STRING,
    Description STRING,
    NumericValue STRING,
    UnitOfMeasure STRING,
    DisplayOrder STRING,
    ValidFromDate STRING,
    ValidToDate STRING,
    ReferenceLink STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType


raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Dataset", "Code", regexp_replace("ValidFromDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("ValidToDate", "-|[/.:]", "")), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||","Description","NumericValue","UnitOfMeasure","DisplayOrder","ReferenceLink"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe

raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table

spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Dataset, Code, Description, NumericValue, UnitOfMeasure, DisplayOrder, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, ReferenceLink, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Dataset, s.Code, s.Description, s.NumericValue, s.UnitOfMeasure, s.DisplayOrder, s.ValidFromDate, s.ValidToDate, s.ReferenceLink, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 


spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( Dataset, Code, Description, NumericValue, UnitOfMeasure, DisplayOrder, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, ReferenceLink, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.Dataset, s.Code, s.Description, s.NumericValue, s.UnitOfMeasure, s.DisplayOrder, s.ValidFromDate, s.ValidToDate, s.ReferenceLink, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters

Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation

Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#display(df_log)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
#  Table: **reference_data**: END
# Table: **fuelcard_facility_map**: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="fuelcard_facility_map"

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#Set table name
if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    db_tablename="fuelcard_facility_map"

    # Set up logger for this notebook section
    logger = setup_logger(db_tablename)	
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
    db_tablename="fuelcard_facility_map"

#Create fuelcard_facility_map: Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    FuelCardNumber STRING,
    Facility STRING,
    ValidFromDate STRING,
    ValidToDate STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when, substring
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

# Add new column for masked fuel card numbers 
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("FuelCardNumberMasked", substring("FuelCardNumber", -5, 5))

# Add CDC columns
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "FuelCardNumber", regexp_replace("ValidFromDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), regexp_replace("ValidToDate", "-|[/.:]", "")), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "FacilityValue"), 256))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#display(raw_df)

# Row count parameters

Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe

raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table

spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( FuelCardNumber, Facility, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FuelCardNumberMasked, s.FacilityValue, s.ValidFromDate, s.ValidToDate, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 

spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT ( FuelCardNumber, Facility, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FuelCardNumberMasked, s.FacilityValue, s.ValidFromDate, s.ValidToDate, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

#Row count parameters

Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation

Bronze_Update = Bronze_Update_Post - Bronze_Update_Pre
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre) + Bronze_Update
Bronze_Delete = Bronze_Delete_Post - Bronze_Delete_Pre
Bronze_ActiveRows = Bronze_ActiveRecord_Post 
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create dataframe to insert log to controldb

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
#print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#display(df_log)

#Write df_log to logging table in controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="sf6_emissions"

#UTILS: Drop db

#spark.sql(f"""DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname} CASCADE""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    #Set table name
    db_tablename="sf6_emissions"

    # Set up logger for this notebook section
    logger = setup_logger(db_tablename)
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    #Create reference_data: Bronze Table
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
    (
        Facility STRING,
        FiscalYear STRING,
        Method STRING,
        QuantitySF6kg STRING,
        QuantitySF6t STRING,
        QuantityTCO2e STRING,
        Scope1EmissionsTCO2e STRING,
        CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCOps INT,
        CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
        HashKey STRING,
        HashDiff STRING   
    )
    USING delta
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
    """)
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.") 
    # Add CDC columns
    from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
    from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
    from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when
    from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
    from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

    raw_df = raw_df.withColumnRenamed("QuantitySF6_kg", "QuantitySF6kg")
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumnRenamed("QuantitySF6_t", "QuantitySF6t")
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumnRenamed("Quantity_tCO2e", "QuantityTCO2e")
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumnRenamed("Scope1Emissions_tCO2e", "Scope1EmissionsTCO2e")
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Facility", "FiscalYear"), 256))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Method", "QuantitySF6kg", "QuantitySF6t", "QuantityTCO2e", "Scope1EmissionsTCO2e"), 256))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
    raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

    #display(raw_df)
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")    
    # Row count parameters
    Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
    Bronze_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
    Bronze_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")

if esg_sharepoint_bronze_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    # SCD2 logic

    # Create a temporary view of the dataframe
    raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

    # Use the merge operation to update the target table
    spark.sql(f"""
        MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
        USING temp_table s
        ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
        WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
          UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Bronze_UpdateEndDate}',
                    t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                    t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
          INSERT (Facility, FiscalYear, Method, QuantitySF6kg, QuantitySF6t, QuantityTCO2e, Scope1EmissionsTCO2e, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
          VALUES (s.Facility, s.FiscalYear, s.Method, s.QuantitySF6kg, s.QuantitySF6t, s.QuantityTCO2e, s.Scope1EmissionsTCO2e, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
    """)

    # Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
    spark.sql(f"""
        MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
        USING temp_table s
        ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
        WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN

    spark.sql(f"""
        MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
        USING temp_table s
